name: nelna-fg-digital-recording-system
description: Nelna FG Digital Recording System — Finished Goods and QA digital recording for Nelna Farm
author: Chinthaka Jayaweera

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @nelna/shared build && pnpm --filter @nelna/ui build && pnpm --filter @nelna/api prisma:generate && pnpm --filter @nelna/api build && pnpm --filter @nelna/web build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @nelna/shared test && pnpm --filter @nelna/ui test && pnpm --filter @nelna/api test && pnpm --filter @nelna/web test
scripts.preview:web: pnpm --filter @nelna/shared build && pnpm --filter @nelna/ui build && pnpm --filter @nelna/web preview
